title: Fun at RLR bazaar
description: GEORGE NEWS - The RLR bazaar takes place...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The RLR bazaar takes place this Saturday, 2 November from 08:00 to 11:00 at the RLR Retirement Centre in De La Fontaine Street.


> Enjoy stalls featuring an array of fantastic offerings, including jewellery, books, handiwork, plants, white elephant sale, gifts, and clothing.


And of course, a variety of eats will be available.

Start your day with a breakfast roll, enjoy a cuppa with a treat at  their popular tea room, or choose some baked goodies and jams to take home.

Don't miss out on this fantastic event! For more information, contact Angelique Botha on 044 874 7494.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
